mapper.sql: AA.WTHDR_SEQ AS SEQ , AA.MEMB_SEQ AS MEMB_SEQ , AA.WTHDR_RSN AS WITHDRAW_REASON , AA.DEL_ACNT AS DEL_ACCOUNT_AGREE_YN , AA.DEL_INTRL AS DEL_LINK_INFO_YN , AA.RGTR AS RGTR , AA.RGT_DTTM AS RGT_DTTM , AA.WTHDR_RSN_TXT AS WITHDRAW_REASON_TXT
mapper.select:
/* com.erns.coching.member.mapper.MemberWithdrawInfoDAO.getWithdrwalStatistics */
SELECT /* 탈회 */ (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM T_MEMB WHERE WTDR_YN ='Y') AS WTHDR_TOTAL_CNT ,(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM T_MEMB WHERE WTDR_YN ='Y' AND now() - 30 < WTDR_DTTM) AS NEW_WTHDR_CNT /* 30일 이내 탈회 */ ,(SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT M1.MEMB_SEQ) FROM T_MEMB M1 JOIN T_BUSINESS_LIC_INF B1 ON M1.MEMB_SEQ = B1.MEMB_SEQ WHERE M1.WTDR_YN ='Y' ) AS WTHDR_BIZ_CNT /* 사업자연동 탈회*/ ,(SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT M1.MEMB_SEQ) FROM T_MEMB M1 JOIN T_BUSINESS_LIC_INF B1 ON M1.MEMB_SEQ = B1.MEMB_SEQ JOIN TB_SC_ACC_INF_DAMO SAI ON B1.CLIENT_NO = SAI.CLIENT_NO WHERE M1.WTDR_YN ='Y' AND ( (SAI.ORG_CD = 'scd' AND (SAI.JOIN_YN = 'Y' OR SAI.JOIN_YN = 'F') ) OR (SAI.ORG_CD = 'card') ) ) AS WTHDR_2ND_CNT /* 카드연동 탈회 */ FROM DUAL
